prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 75.1 kg; Height 154.7 cm; BMI 31.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/67 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 6.8%; 6 months ago 6.3%; 3 months ago 6.0%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 176mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.3kg; 9 months ago 71.7kg; 6 months ago 71.2kg; 3 months ago 73.3kg; current 75.1kg), Height (12 months ago 154.7cm; 9 months ago 154.7cm; 6 months ago 154.7cm; 3 months ago 154.7cm; current 154.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 31.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 66mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 67mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 59U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 60U/L), AST (12 months ago 52U/L; 9 months ago 42U/L; 6 months ago 41U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 49U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; current 48mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 190mg/g; 9 months ago 176mg/g; 6 months ago 174mg/g; 3 months ago 122mg/g; current 122mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 142mg/dL; 9 months ago 140mg/dL; 6 months ago 161mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 150mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.8g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
